title: melilotus italicus
intro: Melilotus italicus, also known as Italian clover or hoary melilot, is a perennial legume plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Melilotus italicus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Melilotus italicus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
